title: Section — Quantity Takeoff (QTO)
description: Normalized takeoff: measured/stated quantities pulled from drawings, schedules, and spec tables, each tied to a CSI code, a unit of measure, and (where known) a scope item and location. This is the structured feed an estimating tool multiplies by unit rates. The model carries only quantities that appear in the documents (or are a direct count of schedule rows) — it does not perform new measurement or pricing.

location.description: Area / room / level / zone / grid the quantity belongs to, when stated — supports area- and phase-based estimating.

assembly.description: UniFormat system/assembly this rolls up to (e.g. 'Interior Partitions').

sheet.description: Drawing sheet / schedule id the quantity was read from.

by_division_summary.description: Optional roll-up of total quantity by CSI division and UOM, for quick conceptual checks.
